name: tahara-claude-plugins
description: tahara-san's personal Claude Code plugin bundle: planner workflow, env-file safety guard, and Codex chunked-review utility.

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: Plan-driven workflow: /plan-doc, /plan-code, /plan-clean, /plan-issues. Includes a Stop hook that enforces out-of-scope issue logging.

plugins.name: env-blocker
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that blocks Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Bash access to .env and .env.* files (allows .env.example / .env.sample).

plugins.name: codex-chunk
plugins.description: Sends large review prompts to Codex CLI in logical chunks, aggregates results. Avoids ~150s codex exec timeout on large diffs/plans.
